item.name: Tsoly Turtle
item.description:
A large turtle that inhabits the depths of water-filled calderas.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This sizable turtle favors the still depths of water-filled calderas. It is also said to have a unique talent for memorizing waterways, and is occasionally observed moving between lakes linked to one another via channels and subterranean passages.
